name: sensitivity
description: Marks content with a data-sensitivity classification tier. Applied at file, section, or inline scope to control visibility, redaction policy, and access gating.

tier.description: Classification level. public = unrestricted; internal = org-visible; confidential = need-to-know; privileged = legal hold; redacted = scrubbed output.

scope.description: Granularity of the classification. Defaults to the tag's positional scope when omitted.

scope_rules.description: File-level wraps the entire document. Section-level wraps a heading block. Inline marks a phrase or span.
